column1: # TSX small/mid-cap candidate universe — manually curated June 2026.
#   * Listed on TSX or TSXV with a Yahoo Finance symbol ending in .TO
#   * Outside the S&P/TSX 60 mega-caps (some bleed into the bottom of the 60 are
#     left in for the size-bucket cross-section to operate on)
# Survivorship caveat: this list reflects names live in 2026; delistings prior
# to that are missing. The paper discusses the resulting upward bias explicitly.
# Refresh procedure: see src/qmj_tsx/data/universe.py for the loader and the
# `qmj data universe` CLI command. To extend
